introSection: Silly Serpent was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Worlds of Fun in Kansas City, Missouri, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The Funicular was purchased new and opened with the park in 1973. For 1979, the ride was moved to the Africa themed area and renamed Silly Serpent. It closed in 1987.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride had a simple oval layout.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * A webpage with a photograph of the Silly Serpent

fullText:
Silly Serpent was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Worlds of Fun in Kansas City, Missouri, USA.

The Funicular was purchased new and opened with the park in 1973. For 1979, the ride was moved to the Africa themed area and renamed Silly Serpent. It closed in 1987.

The ride had a simple oval layout.




 * A webpage with a photograph of the Silly Serpent
